title: Creating a table with a full outer join query gives type with wrong digits on the joined key.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table1 (id Int32, name String, value Decimal(10, 2));
CREATE TABLE test_table2 (id String, description String, amount Float32);
CREATE TABLE result_table AS SELECT t1.id, t1.name, t1.value, t2.description, t2.amount FROM test_table1 AS t1 FULL OUTER JOIN test_table2 AS t2 ON toString(t1.id) = t2.id;
key_bug_features: Full outer join query on tables with mismatched key types
